64.reason: Error: The reserved word "continue" is incorrectly mapped to TokenType.BREAKTK instead of TokenType.CONTINUETK. This causes the lexer to output BREAKTK for "continue" tokens, as seen in the buggy output where "continue" is output as "BREAKTK continue" instead of "CONTINUETK continue".

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: The reserved word "continue" is incorrectly mapped to TokenType.BREAKTK instead of TokenType.CONTINUETK. This causes the lexer to output BREAKTK for "continue" tokens, as seen in the buggy output where "continue" is output as "BREAKTK continue" instead of "CONTINUETK continue".

150.reason: [No bounds check: if line is empty or whitespace-only, pos may become >= input.length() and subsequent access to input.charAt(pos) will throw IndexOutOfBoundsException]
